chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 39 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.201/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.202/2026 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 13.01.2026 Mr. Shamshad Ahmed Siyal, Advocate along with applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Urgency is allowed; however, learned Counsel for the applicants requires to dispose of the present bail application as the applicants are to seek bail from the learned Sessions Court in the matter on account of earlier bail application having been dismissed on default i.e. non- prosecution and not on merits. Present bail application accordingly stands disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
